title: FuelPrices
description: Current US average fuel prices used by the FuelEconomy.gov annual cost calculator.

cng.description: Compressed natural gas price in USD per gasoline gallon equivalent (GGE)

diesel.description: Diesel fuel price in USD per gallon

e85.description: E85 ethanol blend price in USD per gallon

electric.description: Electricity price in USD per kWh

lpg.description: Liquefied petroleum gas price in USD per gallon

midgrade.description: Mid-grade gasoline price in USD per gallon

premium.description: Premium gasoline price in USD per gallon

regular.description: Regular gasoline price in USD per gallon
